text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While shopping, I see a limited-time sale for a
variety pack of donuts.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh! The Super XXL Variety Pack... Today,
you're mine!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoooah!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...H-h-hey, there! Fancy seein' you here!
choice_data_list: Are you here to get some donuts?
Are you here to get some donuts?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Th-there's no way I'd eat some kiddy food like
that. I don't even like sweets!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But uh, my friend asked me to buy them, so I'm
only here 'cause I have to be...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: S-so anyway, you here for the variety pack too?
choice_data_list: Eh, that's a little too much for me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: S-so anyway, you here for the variety pack too?
choice_data_list: Eh, that's a little too much for me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Really? It's not even that mu—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uh, never mind! Forget I said anything!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I guess it is a little much for one person... I'll tell
my friend they were sold out.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: W-well, I've got stuff to do. Peace!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Fresh-baked donuts, full of fluffy cream...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Until we meet again... in my dreams...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka rips her gaze from the donuts and runs
off...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Right? And they're freshly baked, so the cream is
extra fluffy and amazing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Or at least that's what my friend said! Haha...
ha...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we get some to split? They'll sell
out if we keep standin' around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Donuts safely purchased, Vodka and I explore
their flavors to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh... What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Isn't the way the cream melts on the tip of your
tongue just the best?
choice_data_list: I thought you didn't like sweets.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm just testin' the taste! It's not like I'm hooked
or anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, but Vodka smoothly scarfs down
the entire Super XXL Variety Pack...
